affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: subscription table has unique endpoint but no per-user row limit or endpoint format constraint

affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: owner_all RLS permits authenticated users to manage all of their subscription rows

affected_locations.label: sink
affected_locations.detail: reminder worker selects all subscriptions and sends/logs per due subscription

affected_locations.label: sink
affected_locations.detail: coach-push groups all subscriptions by user and sends to every endpoint for that user

evidence: Table has no per-user cap; owner_all permits user-managed rows; two scheduled workers iterate all subscriptions. Operational impact needs runtime/project quota measurement.

facts: Authenticated user creates many distinct own subscription rows; scheduled push workers select and process rows globally, causing outbound attempts and per-row work. Unique endpoint and stale pruning do not cap valid or syntactically distinct rows.
